2606.06985.title: Contrastive Training with LLM-generated Near-Misses for Robust Code-Switching Speech Recognition
2606.06985.paper_summary: Code-switching (CS), the alternation between multiple languages within a single utterance, remains challenging for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). To address this issue, we propose a Point-of-Interest (POI)-aware contrastive training framework that improves recognition at CS-critical regions. We first identify CS spans by adopting POI detection method from literature, then construct acoustically plausible near-miss hypotheses by perturbing POIs in ASR N-best outputs and expanding candidates with a large language model. Hard but plausible negatives are retained through filtering with acoustic, phonemic, and textual constraints. Finally, we fine-tune Whisper-small with LoRA using a POI-weighted cross-entropy anchor objective together with a multi-negative contrastive ranking loss. Experiments on CS-FLEURS (cmn-eng) and ViMedCSS (vie-eng) show consistent reductions of over 2% in both general and CS-aware error rates compared to standard LoRA fine-tuning.
2606.06985.paper_summary_zh: 代碼切換（CS），在單一話語中多語言之間的交替，對於自動語音識別（ASR）仍然具有挑戰性。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一個考慮興趣點（POI）的對比訓練框架，該框架在CS關鍵區域提高識別率。我們首先通過採用文獻中的POI檢測方法來識別CS範圍，然後通過擾動ASR N-best輸出中的POI來構建聲學上合理的近似假設，並利用大型語言模型擴展候選項。通過聲學、音素和文本約束進行過濾，保留困難但合理的負樣本。最後，我們使用POI加權的交叉熵錨點目標以及多負對比排名損失來微調Whisper-small，並使用LoRA。對於CS-FLEURS（cmn-eng）和ViMedCSS（vie-eng）的實驗顯示，與標準LoRA微調相比，兩者的一般和CS-aware錯誤率均穩定降低超過2%。
2606.06985.author: Tung X. Nguyen et.al.
2606.06985.authors: Tung X. Nguyen, Hieu Minh Truong, Giang-Son Nguyen, Nhu Vo, Wray Buntine, Dung D. Le
